name: research-scout
description: Testing plugin for source synthesis, note distillation, and fast research handoffs.

interface.shortDescription: Synthesize sources into crisp findings and follow-ups
interface.longDescription: Use Research Scout to gather source-level findings, collapse them into a quick brief, and hand back a small list of open questions for the next pass.
defaultPrompt: Summarize these sources into a short research brief.
Turn these notes into findings and open questions.
Compare these references and highlight the tradeoffs.
